/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/FluidSymulation.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o FluidSymulation  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework QuartzCore -framework CoreFoundation
